title: 2. NG  Combination of Ling Gu + Da Bai points ( 22.04  and  22.05 )
text:
This combination of points will be useful for almost all patients with any symptoms.
Coronavirus infects all internal organs of the body.
Ling Gu , Da Bai has been particularly influential in San Jiao's troubles and it
Strengthens the lungs.
They also cure headaches.
16 | P a g e
17 | P a g e
